title: Tax return
description: Instruction on how to complete each question in your paper tax return.

child_links.title: Completing individual information on your tax return 2011
child_links.description: Helps you to accurately complete individual information in your tax return and avoid delays in processing.

child_links.title: Income
child_links.description: How to complete income sections of your tax return using myTax.

child_links.title: Deduction questions D1-D10
child_links.description: How to complete deduction questions D1 to D10 in your paper tax return.

child_links.title: Losses question L1
child_links.description: How to complete the losses question L1 in your paper tax return.

child_links.title: Adjusted taxable income (ATI) for you and your dependants 2011
child_links.description: Work out your adjusted taxable income and if you're eligible for certain tax offsets.

child_links.title: Tax offset questions T1-T5
child_links.description: How to complete the tax offset questions T1 to T5 in your paper tax return.

child_links.title: Medicare levy questions M1-M2
child_links.description: How to complete the Medicare levy questions M1 and M2 in your paper tax return.

child_links.title: Private health insurance policy details 2011
child_links.description: Complete this question if you were covered by private health insurance or paid for a dependant-person-only policy.

child_links.title: Adjustments
child_links.description: How to complete adjustments sections of your tax return using myTax.

child_links.title: Income tests
child_links.description: How to complete the Income tests section of your return using myTax.

child_links.title: Spouse details - married or de facto 2011
child_links.description: Complete this question if you had a spouse during 2010-11.
